'''Tar Lup''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] who owned [[Lup's Wares and Supplies]] with his wife [[Kal Lup]]. Although Tar was generally easygoing, he had an old [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]] hidden beneath the counter.

==Appearances==
*[[Kenobi (novel)|''Kenobi'']] {{Ab|Kenobi (audiobook)}}
